one_law: SourceA has TWO sides: KERNEL (foundation — feeds all repos) and COMMERCIAL (paying customers — less infra, more agentic product). Never mix them on disk or in agent rules.

foundation_kernel.role: Governance systems, engines, cloud factory, brain-os entry, scripts, data SSOT

commercial_plane.role: Paying customers only — service + future platform

business_a_service.headline: We build your startup's MVP in 48 hours.
form_questions: What are you building? (app / website / MVP / video / free text)
business_a_service.end_screen: We'll respond in 2 hours with a plan.
business_a_service.scope_v1: No platform · no sandbox · no free tier — form + skills + Cursor delivery
business_a_service.wedge: Apple App Store apps built with AI — specific, credible ICP

business_b_platform.headline: Come build on our platform
business_b_platform.phase: AFTER first 3 service clients fund build ($6k–$10k)

lock_order: Business B only after service revenue
